name: Applied DB Public Company Limited
summary: Applied DB Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes plastic compounds, adhesives, and sealants in Thailand, Nigeria, Kenya, Vietnam, Myanmar, Bangladesh, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Plastic Compound, Adhesive, and Silicone and Sealant. The company's plastic compound products include PVC and non-PVC compounds, such as soft PVC, rigid PVC, pharmaceutical grade, and thermoplastic elastomer compounds, as well as PP split yarn for wire and cable fillers. Its adhesive products comprise contact, grafted, PU, vinyl, and emulsion latex water-based adhesives, as well as thinners, primers, and hardeners. The company's sealant products include acetic silicone, neutral silicone, acrylic, super nail construction, PU, and spur polymer hybrid sealants. It also offers DIY products comprising super glues, RTV gasket makers, household adhesive and sealants, epoxy adhesive and putties, and specialist products. The company provides its products to wire and cable, real estate and construction, and shoes and leather industries, as well as household end-users. Applied DB Public Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Mueang Samut Prakan, Thailand.
